## Meeting Purpose

[Final check-in on launch readiness and open tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch Readiness:** The team is in good shape, with only 6 "Instabilized" tickets remaining on the Linear board.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Onboarding Fixes:** The brand research flow is being stabilized with a 1-minute timeout to unblock users and a fix for a bug where a catalog lookup prevents description updates.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [**Performance Bottleneck:** The "Sources" page is slow due to `GROUP BY` operations on text columns in the large `sortable_pointers` table; potential fixes include optimizing queries or purging old data.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Plan Disagreement:** Bridget opposes the default Unlimited plan for new customers, arguing the Pro plan is sufficient. Stevie will discuss this internally, but it is not a launch blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

## Topics

### Launch Readiness & Ticket Status

  - [**Linear Board:** 6 tickets remain in "Instabilized."](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Deployed:** "Unified trend decimals"](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Next:** "Updates on the prompts page after we update a prompt"](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Resolved:** "Workspace cookie" bug (caused by a missing workspace ID in the `useSWR` key).](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Deployed:** "Overview page subcategory charts fix" (required backfilling data with a new snapshot scope).](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [**In Progress:** "Group trend lines" (for prompts table).](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
          - [**Strategy:** Aggregate totals from individual prompt snapshots, then average. This avoids creating a new snapshot type and straining infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [**Onboarding Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
          - [**Brand Research Timeout:** If research fails after 1 min, users can proceed with empty categories to fill manually.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
          - [**Brand Description Bug:** A catalog lookup for a similar-named company (e.g., "branch" vs. "branch.io") prevents the new brand's description from being updated.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
              - [**Fix:** Skip the catalog lookup during onboarding if the user confirms it's a new company.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
              - [**Dependency:** This fix is on hold until Daniel migrates workflows to avoid conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [**Other Tasks:**](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
          - [Fix: Hide "Billing" menu item for workspaces without a subscription.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
          - [Pulled 2 SEO regression fixes from P1.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
          - [Next: Polish onboarding UI.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [**Stevie & Leo:**](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [**Stevie:** Performing a final QA pass on areas with recent changes, including the billing flow.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [**Leo:** Updating test plans and coordinating with Stevie.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### Performance Issue: Sources Page

  - [**Problem:** The "Sources" page is slow.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The page uses `sortable_pointers` and requires `GROUP BY` operations on text columns (domain/URL) to aggregate data.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Contributing Factor:** The `sortable_pointers` table is very large (3-4x the size of the `snapshots` table) because it captures multiple pointers per snapshot.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [**Potential Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [Optimize the query.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [Purge old data from the `sortable_pointers` table, as only the latest capture date is typically used.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Product Decision: Default Plan

  - [**Issue:** Bridget opposes the default Unlimited plan for new customers, arguing the Pro plan is sufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**Context:** The decision was based on the assumption that EMs will manage the platform for customers, making the plan tier less critical for the customer's direct experience.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Stevie will discuss this internally. It is not a launch blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/sDHwaRvr-J4mqzDk-Ycopv8xF58u-ycq?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
